96.reason: strcmp returns >0 when p->word is lexicographically greater than q->word, but the condition should be >0, not ==1. This causes incorrect sorting because not all positive return values are 1.

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  strcmp returns >0 when p->word is lexicographically greater than q->word, but the condition should be >0, not ==1. This causes incorrect sorting because not all positive return values are 1.
